items.title: Google just declared itself a contender in AI design at IO 2026
items.summary: Google says it's designed the app to be accessible to everyone, from teachers to small business owners.

items.title: You can now talk to your Gmail inbox, as seen at Google IO 2026
items.summary: Google expands Gmail’s AI Inbox with conversational voice search, letting users ask Gemini to find buried email details.

items.title: How to use Google’s new AI agents to go beyond your standard searches
items.summary: Google is launching AI-powered “information agents” that can monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates and changes.

items.title: From teen hacker to Iron Dome researcher, this founder raised $28M to fight AI phishing
items.summary: Ocean, an agentic email security platform, claims its AI can thoroughly analyze the context of every incoming email to detect fraud and impersonation attempts.

items.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
items.summary: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.

items.title: Google takes a page out of Meta’s book, announces new audio-powered smart glasses at IO 2026
items.summary: Google is calling the new devices "audio glasses," in that users will be able to issue verbal commands to them and get things done via its ecosystem of apps and services, including Gemini.

items.summary: Google DeepMind is integrating Street View with Project Genie to create immersive, interactive world simulations for robotics, gaming, and travel, allowing users to explore environments, weather changes, and rare scenar…

items.title: With Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google bets its next AI wave on agents, not chatbots
items.summary: Google launched Gemini 3.5 Flash, its most powerful coding and agentic AI model yet, at the company's annual developer conference. It is capable of autonomously executing complex tasks and building software from scratch.

items.title: Google Search as you know it is over
items.summary: Google is transforming Search from a list of links into an AI-powered experience filled with conversational answers, autonomous agents, and interactive interfaces — a shift that could further reduce traffic to publisher…

items.summary: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.

items.title: OpenAI is making it easier to check if an image was made by their models
items.summary: OpenAI announced two new measures to help detect AI generated imagery: joining the open C2PA standard and adding Google's SynthID to its products.

items.summary: Google is embracing the rise of AI coding agents with new Android tools designed to work with platforms like Claude Code and OpenAI’s Codex, allowing developers — or their AI assistants — to build Android apps faster fr…

items.title: Google’s AI Studio now lets anyone build Android apps in minutes
items.summary: Google unveiled new web-based AI tools that can generate native Android apps in minutes, as the company expands its push into AI-powered software development.

items.title: Google’s new Universal Cart wants to follow your entire shopping journey across the internet
items.summary: Most people shop across multiple devices, many retailers, and over the course of many days, which is why Google is launching Universal Cart.

items.title: Google launches Antigravity 2.0 with an updated desktop app and CLI tool at IO 2026
items.summary: Google is debuting a new AI Ultra plan priced at $100, which will give users 5x more usage limit than the AI Pro plan alongside the Antigravity 2.0 launch.

items.title: Google introduces Gemini Spark, a 24/7 agentic assistant with Gmail integration, at IO 2026
items.summary: At the Google I/O developer conference, the company announced a new agentic personal assistant called Gemini Spark, built from Gemini's base models and an agentic harness from Google Antigravity.

items.title: Google adds voice-based prompting to Docs and Keep
items.summary: Google is letting users create drafts, take notes, and search for email with voice with the new Workspace update.

items.title: Google updates its Gemini app to take on ChatGPT and Claude at IO 2026
items.summary: The updates signal Google’s push to turn its Gemini app into an all-purpose AI hub rather than a stand-alone chatbot.

items.title: Google’s Gemini Omni turns images, audio, and text into video — and that’s just the start
items.summary: Google's Gemini Omni is a new multimodal model that reasons across text, images, audio, and video to generate and edit videos through simple conversation — starting with Omni Flash.

items.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
